data.title: Momentum's cumulative transaction volume exceeds US$23 billion
data.description: According to the latest data, Momentum, the leading decentralized exchange (DEX) and liquidity hub within the Sui ecosystem, has surpassed $23 billion in cumulative trading volume. Since surpassing $20 billion on October 12th, trading volume has increased by over $3 billion in just six days, representing a 15% increase from the previous week, continuing its strong growth momentum.

data.title: Charles Hoskinson Calls Midnight Cardano’s Most Transformational Project Yet
data.description:
Charles Hoskinson, the co-founder of Cardano, has recently expressed his belief that Midnight represents the most transformative project the Cardano ecosystem has seen to date. He emphasizes the potential of this initiative to revolutionize the way we think about blockchain technology and its applications, highlighting its unique features and capabilities that could significantly impact various industries and enhance user experiences within the Cardano network.
source: https://blocknews.com/charles-hoskinson-calls-midnight-cardanos-most-transformational-project-yet/

data.title: Dogecoin Tanks 21% as Whales Dump $74 Million — Despite Nasdaq Merger Buzz
data.description:
Dogecoin, the popular cryptocurrency that started as a meme, experienced a significant decline of 21% in its value after major investors, often referred to as "whales," sold off a staggering $74 million worth of the digital currency. This drop occurred even in the midst of excitement and speculation surrounding a potential merger with the Nasdaq, highlighting the volatile nature of the cryptocurrency market and the impact that large-scale sell-offs can have on asset prices.
source: https://blocknews.com/dogecoin-tanks-21-as-whales-dump-74-million-despite-nasdaq-merger-buzz/

data.title: Solana Agave 3.0 Update Enhances Transaction Speed and Efficiency
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Solana has launched its Agave 3. 0 update, introducing significant improvements to its blockchain network. The update enhances transaction processing speed by 30% to 40%, optimizing the system's performance. Key features include the introduction of the eXpress Data Path (XDP) to optimize Turbine, increased CPI nesting depth, and enhanced single-account computation limits
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/31163710396074?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: BNB Chain Seeks Oracle Solution for Prediction Markets
data.description:
According to Foresight News, BNB Chain has announced its search for a dedicated oracle solution to support large-scale prediction markets. The desired solution should be secure, hybrid in nature, and optimized for developers. Suitable projects are invited to submit proposals.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/31163093133425?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Binance Futures to Delist Contracts and Update Leverage Tiers
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, Binance Futures is set to close all positions and conduct an automatic settlement for specific perpetual contracts. The USDⓈ-M SLERFUSDT Perpetual Contract will be settled on 2025-10-21 at 09:00 (UTC), followed by the COIN-M CHZUSD Perpetual Contract at 10:00 (UTC). Post-settlement, these contracts will be delisted. Additionally, Binance Futures will update the leverage and margin tiers for the USDⓈ-M SLERFUSDT Perpetual Contract on 2025-10-20 at 06:30 (UTC), with the process expected to conclude within an hour.

The updated leverage and margin tiers will affect existing positions, and users are advised to adjust accordingly. Notably, users will not be able to open new positions for the specified contracts starting from 2025-10-21 at 08:30 (UTC) for the USDⓈ-M SLERFUSDT Perpetual Contract and 09:30 (UTC) for the COIN-M CHZUSD Perpetual Contract. During the final hour before the scheduled settlement, the Futures Insurance Fund will not support the liquidation process. Any liquidation triggered will be executed as a single Immediate or Cancel order (IOCO). If the IOCO does not fully reduce the position to meet the Margin Maintenance requirements, the Auto-Deleveraging (ADL) process will resolve any unfilled portion.

Users are strongly advised to monitor and manage open positions during the final hour due to potential volatility and reduced liquidity. Binance Futures may implement additional protective measures without further notice, including adjustments to leverage values, position values, maintenance margins, funding rates, and price index constituents. These measures aim to protect users and mitigate risks in volatile market conditions.

data.title: Solana Agave 3.0 Update Enhances Transaction Speed and Efficiency
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Solana has launched its Agave 3.0 update, introducing significant improvements to its blockchain network. The update enhances transaction processing speed by 30% to 40%, optimizing the system's performance. Key features include the introduction of the eXpress Data Path (XDP) to optimize Turbine, increased CPI nesting depth, and enhanced single-account computation limits.

Additionally, the update includes the new TransactionView structure for schedulers, faster startup times, and improvements to RPC WebSockets. These advancements aim to bolster the efficiency and functionality of the Solana network, providing users with a more streamlined experience.

data.title: He Yi once again responded to the Binance Alpha airdrop being "difficult to grab" and said he would solve the problem
data.description: In response to community users' repeated concerns about the Binance Alpha airdrop being "difficult to claim" and "reaching the point where it's impossible to claim," and their calls for Binance to rewrite its rules, Binance Co-founder He Yi issued a statement on the X platform, stating that the issue would be resolved. Previously, users had also raised concerns about the use of technology to make the Binance Alpha airdrop "difficult to claim." In response, He Yi stated, "I'll handle risk control. We welcome suggestions for comprehensive technology solutions."

data.title: US Bitcoin ETFs see $1.2 Billion in weekly outflows
data.description:
US spot Bitcoin ETFs faced $1. 2B in weekly outflows as Bitcoin fell to a four-month low. BlackRock, Fidelity, and Grayscale saw major redemptions amid Bitcoin’s 10% weekly drop. Schwab says crypto interest is rising, with clients holding 20% of US crypto ETPs
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/us-bitcoin-etfs-see-1-2-billion-in-weekly-outflows/

data.title: CZ Warns BNB Treasury Firms: Use Custodians or Lose Investment Access
data.description:
CZ, the co-founder and CEO of Binance, has issued a warning to firms managing BNB treasury funds, emphasizing the critical importance of employing secure custodial services. He stated that failure to utilize reputable custodians for their treasury management could result in a loss of access to investment opportunities and essential resources on the Binance platform. This cautionary message highlights the importance of safeguarding digital assets and ensuring compliance with industry standards to maintain operational integrity and trust in the cryptocurrency ecosystem.
source: https://blocknews.com/cz-warns-bnb-treasury-firms-use-custodians-or-lose-investment-access/

data.title: Cardano Price Faces Pressure, But Signs Hint at a Possible Rebound
data.description:
The price of Cardano is currently experiencing significant downward pressure, as various market factors and investor sentiment contribute to its volatility. However, despite these challenges, there are emerging indicators and signs that suggest a potential rebound might be on the horizon, offering hope to investors looking for a turnaround in the cryptocurrency's value.
source: https://blocknews.com/cardano-price-faces-pressure-but-signs-hint-at-a-possible-rebound/

data.title: HMRC intensifies crackdown on unpaid crypto taxes
data.description:
HMRC sent nearly 65,000 warning letters to crypto investors in 2024–2025, more than double last year’s total.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hmrc-intensifies-crackdown-on-crypto-taxes/
